mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_spaces (name, emoji, bg_color, owner_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{emoji}, #{bgColor}, #{ownerId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ts.id, ts.name, ts.emoji, ts.bg_color, ts.owner_id, ts.created_at, ts.updated_at FROM team_spaces ts INNER JOIN team_space_members tsm ON ts.id = tsm.space_id WHERE tsm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ts.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE team_spaces SET name = #{name}, emoji = #{emoji}, bg_color = #{bgColor}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_space_members (space_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{spaceId}, #{userId}, #{role}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT tsm.id, tsm.space_id, tsm.user_id, u.username, tsm.role, tsm.joined_at FROM team_space_members tsm INNER JOIN users u ON tsm.user_id = u.id WHERE tsm.space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY tsm.joined_at ASC

SELECT tsm.id, tsm.space_id, tsm.user_id, u.username, tsm.role, tsm.joined_at FROM team_space_members tsm INNER JOIN users u ON tsm.user_id = u.id WHERE tsm.space_id = #{spaceId} AND tsm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM team_space_members WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND user_id = #{userId}
